---
title: "Applications"
description: "Select an application to open it."
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow, noarchive">
    include-after-body:
      text: |
        <script src="assets/js/access-identity.js"></script>
---

::: {.portal-intro}

## Your applications

Select a product below. Access to each product is controlled separately through Cloudflare Access.

<div class="access-account" hidden>
  <span>Signed in as <strong data-access-email></strong></span>
  <a href="/cdn-cgi/access/logout">Sign out</a>
</div>

:::

::: {.app-launcher}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
#| warning: false
#| message: false

escape_html <- function(value) {
  value <- gsub("&", "&amp;", value, fixed = TRUE)
  value <- gsub("<", "&lt;", value, fixed = TRUE)
  value <- gsub(">", "&gt;", value, fixed = TRUE)
  value <- gsub('"', "&quot;", value, fixed = TRUE)
  gsub("'", "&#39;", value, fixed = TRUE)
}

normalize_url <- function(value) {
  value <- trimws(value %||% "")
  if (!nzchar(value) || !grepl("^https://", value, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  value
}

`%||%` <- function(left, right) {
  if (is.null(left) || length(left) == 0 || is.na(left)) right else left
}

catalog_path <- "data/apps.yml"
apps <- list()

if (file.exists(catalog_path) && requireNamespace("yaml", quietly = TRUE)) {
  catalog <- yaml::read_yaml(catalog_path)
  apps <- catalog$apps %||% list()
}

if (length(apps) == 0) {
  cat('<p class="app-empty">No applications are configured yet.</p>')
} else {
  cat('<ul class="app-grid" aria-label="Available applications">\n')

  for (app in apps) {
    title <- escape_html(app$title %||% "Application")
    description <- escape_html(app$description %||% "")
    status <- tolower(app$status %||% "available")
    action <- escape_html(app$action %||% "Open application")
    url <- normalize_url(app$url)
    available <- identical(status, "available") && !is.na(url)

    cat('<li>\n')

    if (available) {
      cat(sprintf('<a class="app-tile" href="%s">\n', escape_html(url)))
    } else {
      cat('<article class="app-tile app-tile--disabled" aria-disabled="true">\n')
    }

    cat(sprintf('<span class="app-status">%s</span>\n', if (available) "Available" else "Coming soon"))
    cat(sprintf('<h3>%s</h3>\n', title))
    cat(sprintf('<p>%s</p>\n', description))
    cat(sprintf('<span class="app-action">%s%s</span>\n', action, if (available) " →" else ""))

    cat(if (available) '</a>\n' else '</article>\n')
    cat('</li>\n')
  }

  cat('</ul>\n')
}
```

:::

::: {.portal-support}

### Need help with access?

Contact [Sun Data Analytics](mailto:jonathon@sun-dataanalytics.com) if an application is missing or you cannot open a product assigned to your account.

:::
